title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Bank Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Bank Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
HDFC Bank Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Raipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HDFC Bank Global Group:
HDFC Bank Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Bank Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
